title: scan_from - 1 is plain subtraction; u64 underflow if tip is 0
description: In e2e_testnet.rs line 266, store.set_scan_tip(scan_from - 1) uses plain u64 subtraction. scan_from = tip.saturating_sub(4) uses saturating arithmetic, but the subsequent -1 does not. If a malfunctioning node returns tip=0, scan_from=0 and scan_from-1 underflows to u64::MAX in release or panics in debug. The connectivity test that asserts tip>280000 is a separate #[ignore] test not guaranteed to run first. Fix: use scan_from.saturating_sub(1) to be consistent with the saturating pattern on the preceding line.
